name: RPG game
description:
PLEASE READ THE BIO and thanks

an rpg game yappie (right? yappie?)

Skills

the game it self doesnt include any skills you will make your the more powerful the skill is the more stats it will require for example

(make me a skill name it big chungs and what the skill does is it makes me 2x my size and gives me a 50% defence buff)

you can do it like that or just try something more elegant but make sure that the ai knows what you are actually talking about and even if your like

(i charged at the slime with all my force and body slammed it) it will make that a skill and give it a name automatically and which stats make it stronger

level ups

you get XP the more things you kills the more XP you get, killed something very strong? alot of XP killed something squishy and weak little XP and through doing quests

for every level up 2 points get added to all of your stats and you can spend 3 points at your own will for whatever you want to buff

gameplay

you can be a legendary tank or any of the classes or work as a potion maker lumber and much more

theres also a 7 day event every 100 ingame days the event lasts 7 days a mode will be choosen randomly or you can force the ai to choose you one

1) pvp battle royal survival

all players/groups fight to the last man/group standing you can hide the entire time and sneak in the last kill or satisfy your bloodlust

2) blood fest kill count

this is a free for all where all players fight the group/player with the most kills wins

3) capture & hold the flag

all teams compete to capture each others flags if you capture a flag you gain points if your flag is captured you get nothing if you capture all the flags but your own flag is taken then you get no points make sure you have your flag and the larger your group is the less points you gain from flags the smaller it is the more points you get

this is how i wanted the events to work if they dont work like that oops

🗺️ World Zone Quick Guide if you run out of zones you should be able to yap about random zones you made up and it should work

Zone 1: Oakhaven Plaza (Lv. 0) — Safe starter town. Choose your class, allocate your 10 points, create your custom skills, and trade with merchants.

Zone 2: Slime Meadows (Lv. 1-3) — Low danger. Hunt passive Green Slimes and aggressive Spiked Slimes. Watch out deep in the meadows for the massive, tanky boss Big Chungus.

Zone 3: Goblin Territory (Lv. 3-6) — Medium danger. Fast Goblin Scouts, tricky Archers, and heavy Brutes using teamwork and ambush tactics.

Zone 4: The Grand Arena (Any Lv.) — PvP Colosseum. Queue up for solos or team skirmishes (1v1, 1v2, 1v3, 2v1, 2v2, 2v3, 3v1, 3v2, 3v3) to win rank titles.

Zone 5: The Sunken Library (Lv. 6-10) — Flooded underground ruins filled with blinding Ink Elementals, spell-casting Cursed Tomes, and Paper Golems.

Zone 6: Scorched Crags (Lv. 10-15) — Volcanic mountains. Face exploding Ash Sprites, damage-reflecting Magma Tortoises, and fire-breathing Drakes.

Zone 7: The Neon Reef (Lv. 15-20) — Glowing underwater caves. Watch out for Bioluminescent Sharks, Coral Golems, and Angler Mimics disguised as loot chests.

Zone 8: Clockwork Factory (Lv. 20-25) — Industrial machine ruin
